rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reordering the original draft to improve clarity and flow.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the generalization of the ablation result and the statistical significance of the ImageNet-1k gap.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the requested scope with minor drifts, addressing all required dimensions and providing relevant evidence.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free but introduced one minor regression, such as the potential over-trust in 'high'/'very high' labels by end-users, which was not explicitly addressed.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change was annotated with source and reason, providing transparency into the revision process.
